notes: Keep the fight canvas, fighters, projectiles, hit effects, ring-outs, and camera on the top pane.
Do not place required touch controls over the fight canvas in dual-screen mode.

bottom.role: match HUD, fruit powers, awakening meter, pause, and rematch controls
notes: Use the bottom pane for damage/stock readouts, move cards, power cooldowns, and match receipts.
Touch controls are allowed here but keyboard/controller mappings must remain primary for RGDS-style play.

controls.touch: bottom-pane menu and optional move buttons
notes: One full local match must be playable without touchscreen-only actions.

requiredReceipts: stacked-ds layout shows arena above HUD
foldable or simulated segment layout keeps arena and controls separated
RGDS Android mode device receipt before marking verified
one full match reaches win/loss/rematch state
